use anyhow::{Context, Result};
use std::io;

fn handle_request(raw: &[u8]) -> Result<Response> {
    let req = parse_request(raw).context("parsing inbound request")?;
    process(req).context("processing request")
}

fn parse_request(_raw: &[u8]) -> Result<Request> {
    todo!()
}

fn process(_req: Request) -> Result<Response> {
    todo!()
}

fn handle_with_downcast(raw: &[u8]) -> Result<Response> {
    let req = parse_request(raw).context("parsing inbound request")?;
    match process(req) {
        Ok(resp) => Ok(resp),
        Err(e) => {
            if let Some(timeout) = e.downcast_ref::<TimeoutError>() {
                Err(anyhow::anyhow!("service timeout after {}ms: {e}", timeout.ms)
                    .context("request handling failed"))
            } else {
                Err(e).context("request handling failed")
            }
        }
    }
}

struct Request;
struct Response;
struct TimeoutError {
    ms: u64,
}
